title: Tottenham seal £100m move for Newcastle's Tonali
summary: Tottenham completed the signing of midfielder Sandro Tonali from Newcastle United for a club-record fee that could reach £100 million. This marks one of the summer's major transfer deals, significantly strengthening Tottenham's midfield options.
content: Tottenham complete the signing of midfielder Sandro Tonali from Newcastle United for a club-record fee which could reach £100m.

zh.title: 热刺以创纪录1亿英镑完成托纳利转会
zh.summary: 热刺从纽卡斯尔联队完成了中场球员桑德罗·托纳利的签约，转会费为创俱乐部纪录的1亿英镑。这是今年夏季转会市场上的重大交易之一，大大加强了热刺的中场实力。

title: Glasner becomes Forest's fifth head coach in a year
summary: Oliver Glasner, former Crystal Palace manager, has replaced Vitor Pereira as Nottingham Forest's head coach following Pereira's recent sacking. This marks the club's fifth managerial change in a year, highlighting significant instability in the coaching position.
content: Former Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner replaces Vitor Pereira following his sacking last week.

zh.title: 格拉斯纳成为森林队一年来第五位主教练
zh.summary: 前水晶宫主教练奥利弗·格拉斯纳在维托尔·佩雷拉最近被解雇后接替其成为诺丁汉森林队的主教练。这标志着该俱乐部在一年内经历了第五次主教练变更，凸显了该职位的严重不稳定性。

title: Will Glasner tarnish Palace legacy with move to new enemies Forest?
summary: The article questions whether Oliver Glasner's move from Crystal Palace to Nottingham Forest will damage his legacy at Palace, as the two clubs are traditional rivals.
content: Will Oliver Glasner tarnish Crystal Palace legacy with Nottingham Forest move?

zh.title: 格拉斯纳转会宿敌森林队会损害水晶宫遗产吗？
zh.summary: 这篇文章质疑奥利弗·格拉斯纳从水晶宫转会到诺丁汉森林队是否会损害他在水晶宫的遗产，因为这两家俱乐部是传统对手。

title: What are the games to look out for in the Scottish League Cup?
summary: Four top-flight clubs begin their competitive season in the Scottish League Cup group stages on Saturday. The matches provide an early competitive test for the sides as they kick off their campaigns.
content: Four top-flight clubs open their competitive season in the group stages of the Scottish League Cup on Saturday.

zh.title: 苏格兰联赛杯有哪些值得关注的比赛?
zh.summary: 四支顶级联赛俱乐部将于周六开始在苏格兰联赛杯小组阶段进行他们的竞争赛季。这些比赛为各球队在开启其赛季时提供了早期的竞争性考验。

title: Fifa decision on Balogun ban 'incomprehensible' - Uefa
summary: UEFA has strongly criticized FIFA's decision not to uphold Folarin Balogun's immediate suspension at the World Cup, calling it "unprecedented, incomprehensible and unjustifiable." The disagreement highlights tension between football's governing bodies on disciplinary matters.
content: Uefa has strongly criticised Fifa's shock decision not to uphold Folarin Balogun's immediate suspension at the World Cup, calling it "unprecedented, incomprehensible and unjustifiable".

zh.title: FIFA关于巴洛贡禁赛的决定"难以理解"——欧足联
zh.summary: 欧足联强烈批评国际足联未维持福拉林·巴洛贡在世界杯上的立即禁赛决定，称其"前所未有、难以理解且不合理"。这一分歧突出了足球管理机构在纪律事项上的紧张关系。

title: Quiz: Name every team England have played in a World Cup quarter-final
summary: A quiz challenging readers to name the 10 teams England has faced in previous World Cup quarter-finals, with Norway set to become the 11th opponent.
content: Norway will be the 11th team England will have faced in a World Cup quarter-final - so can you name the other 10?

zh.title: 测验：说出英格兰在世界杯四分之一决赛中交过手的每一支球队
zh.summary: 这是一个测验，要求读者说出英格兰在以前世界杯四分之一决赛中面对的10支球队，挪威将成为第11支对手。

title: Who has been eliminated from the World Cup?
summary: BBC Sport provides a comprehensive list of all nations eliminated from the 2026 World Cup so far.
content: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team lists the full set of nations who have been eliminated from the 2026 World Cup so far

zh.title: 世界杯中哪些球队已被淘汰?

title: Bologna keen on Rangers' Barron amid possible Ferguson swap - gossip
summary: Bologna is interested in signing Rangers midfielder Barron, with reports of a possible player swap involving Ferguson. The article covers transfer speculation involving Rangers players and other club targets.
content: Rangers midfielders linked with moves, speculation over Celtic targets and St Johnstone to offer winger trial.

zh.title: 博洛尼亚对流浪者队巴伦感兴趣 可能涉及弗格森互换交易 - 转会新闻
zh.summary: 博洛尼亚对流浪者队中场球员巴伦感兴趣,据报道可能涉及弗格森的球员互换交易。该文章报道了与流浪者队球员和其他俱乐部目标相关的转会传言。

title: Neymar says Brazil career over after Norway defeat
summary: An emotional Neymar announced that his international career with Brazil is over following the team's World Cup exit to Norway. The statement marks the end of an era for the Brazilian star's national team involvement.
content: An emotional Neymar says his international career for Brazil is "over" following his side's exit at the 2026 World Cup at the hands of Norway.

zh.title: 内马尔称在挪威击败后其巴西职业生涯结束
zh.summary: 情绪激动的内马尔宣布,在巴西队被挪威击败无缘世界杯后,他的国家队职业生涯结束。这一声明标志着这位巴西球星国家队生涯的结束。

title: Henderson injures wrist in England celebrations
summary: England midfielder Jordan Henderson suffered a wrist injury while celebrating England's World Cup victory over Mexico, which head coach Thomas Tuchel described as "really bad." The injury raises concerns about Henderson's availability for future matches.
content: England midfielder Jordan Henderson suffered a "really bad" while celebrating his side's World Cup win over Mexico, head coach Thomas Tuchel says.

zh.title: 亨德森在英格兰庆祝中手腕受伤
zh.summary: 英格兰中场球员乔丹·亨德森在庆祝英格兰击败墨西哥赢得世界杯胜利时手腕受伤,主教练托马斯·图赫尔称其为"非常糟糕"。这次受伤引发了对亨德森未来比赛能否出场的担忧。

title: 'Iconic match at iconic stadium' - England win down to 'pure will'
summary: England earned praise for displaying "heart and belief" in defeating Mexico at an iconic stadium to reach the World Cup quarter-finals. The performance is highlighted as a showcase of the team's character and determination under pressure.
content: England are praised for showing "heart and belief" as they beat Mexico in an "iconic match at an iconic stadium" to reach the World Cup quarter-finals.

zh.title: 标志性的比赛在标志性的体育场 - 英格兰胜利源于"纯粹的意志"
zh.summary: 英格兰在标志性的体育场击败墨西哥进入世界杯四分之一决赛,因展现"决心和信念"而获得称赞。这场比赛展现了球队在压力下的性格和决心。

title: An incredible night when England heroes were made
summary: On a dramatic night of sport, England delivered one of their greatest performances in an atmospheric stadium setting. The article captures the emotional intensity and theatre of England's World Cup success.
content: On a spine-tingling night of drama, emotion and pure theatre in one of sport's most atmospheric arenas, England delivered one of their greatest performances.

zh.title: 英格兰英雄诞生的不可思议的夜晚
zh.summary: 在一个戏剧化的体育夜晚,英格兰在充满气氛的体育场环境中展现了他们最伟大的表现之一。这篇文章捕捉了英格兰世界杯成功的情感强度和戏剧性。

title: How Mexico's World Cup run brought joy after a year of fear
summary: Despite Mexico's last-16 exit, the World Cup campaign has brought significant joy to the country's football-loving community. The positive impact has extended to Southern California, home to one of the largest Mexican diaspora populations.
content: For Mexico's football-loving community, the World Cup has been a triumph, despite their last-16 exit. The joy has spread to Southern California, home to one of the largest Mexican communities outside Mexico.

zh.title: 墨西哥世界杯之旅如何在恐惧之年后带来喜悦
zh.summary: 尽管墨西哥在16强阶段出局，但世界杯活动为该国热爱足球的社区带来了巨大喜悦。这种积极影响也延伸到了南加州，那里是最大的墨西哥侨民聚居地之一。

title: Family travels 6,500 miles to see son play 13 minutes at World Cup
summary: Callan Elliot's family traveled thousands of miles from Annan to see their son play just 13 minutes for New Zealand at the World Cup. The journey exemplifies the dedication of families supporting loved ones at football's biggest stage.
content: Callan Elliot's family flew thousands of miles to see their son - originally from Annan - play for New Zealand.

zh.title: 家庭行驶6500英里观看儿子在世界杯上踢13分钟
zh.summary: 卡伦·埃利奥特的家人从安南远程数千英里前往观看他们的儿子代表新西兰在世界杯上踢13分钟。这段旅程体现了家人在足球最大舞台上支持所爱之人的奉献精神。

title: What Haaland's home town did when Norway beat Brazil
summary: Erling Haaland's hometown of Bryne celebrated enthusiastically as their local hero scored both goals in Norway's upset victory over Brazil in the World Cup. The celebration highlighted local pride in Haaland's World Cup performance.
content: Watch how Erling Haaland's hometown of Bryne reacted to their hero scoring both goals as Norway knocked out Brazil to advance to the quarter-final of the World Cup.

zh.title: 当挪威击败巴西时哈兰德故乡的反应
zh.summary: 厄德林·哈兰德的故乡布林市热烈庆祝他们的本地英雄在世界杯上代表挪威以不可思议的方式击败巴西时打进两球。这个庆祝活动突显了对哈兰德世界杯表现的本地自豪感。

title: The man England will fear most - Haaland fires Norway to history
summary: Erling Haaland has scored seven goals in four World Cup matches, positioning him as the tournament's most lethal striker and England's primary concern. His dominant performance has propelled Norway to an historic quarter-final appearance.
content: Erling Haaland has scored seven goals in four World Cup games and he is the striker that nobody wants to face as he fires Norway into an historic quarter-final.

zh.title: 英格兰最担忧的人物 - 哈兰德助挪威创造历史
zh.summary: 埃林·哈兰德在4场世界杯比赛中已打进7球，成为本届赛事最具杀伤力的射手，也是英格兰的主要隐患。他的出色表现将挪威推进到了历史性的四分之一决赛。

title: Who produced another iconic performance? England player ratings
summary: BBC Sport evaluates England's players following their last-16 victory over Mexico, assessing individual performances in the knockout match. The ratings provide insight into which Three Lions players delivered in the crucial contest.
content: BBC Sport England reporter Alex Howell rates how the Three Lions players performed in the last-16 win over Mexico.

zh.title: 谁再次创造了标志性表现？英格兰队球员评分
zh.summary: BBC体育评估英格兰队在击败墨西哥的十六强比赛后的表现，评价球员在这场淘汰赛中的个人表现。评分揭示了三狮军团的哪些球员在这场关键比赛中有出色发挥。

title: Penalty? Red card? Why were they given against England?
summary: England faced controversial officiating decisions in their last-16 match against Mexico, including a red card for Jarell Quansah and a penalty award. The contentious calls raised questions about VAR decision-making in the knockout stage.
content: Why did England have Jarell Quansah sent off and a penalty awarded against them in their thrilling World Cup last-16 match with Mexico?

zh.title: 点球？红牌？为什么对英格兰做出这样的判罚？
zh.summary: 英格兰在对阵墨西哥的十六强比赛中遭遇争议判罚，包括对贾雷尔·夸夏的红牌和点球判罚。这些有争议的判罚引发了人们对VAR在淘汰赛阶段决策的质疑。

title: 'Nasty, nasty challenge' - Quansah shown red card
summary: England defender Jarell Quansah received a red card following a VAR review for a harsh challenge on Mexico's Jesus Gallardo in their last-16 clash. The dismissal left England playing with ten men during the crucial match.
content: England are reduced to ten men as Jarrel Quansah is shown a red card following a VAR review for a "nasty" challenge on Mexico's Jesus Gallardo.

zh.title: "恶劣、恶劣的犯规" - 夸沙被罚下红牌
zh.summary: 英格兰后卫贾瑞尔·夸沙在16强对阵墨西哥的比赛中对墨西哥球员赫苏斯·加亚多做出严重犯规，经VAR审查后被罚下红牌。这个罚下使英格兰在这场关键比赛中少一人作战。

title: Bellingham scores two in 98 seconds to silence the Azteca
summary: Jude Bellingham scored twice in just 98 seconds to establish England's 2-0 lead over Mexico in their last-16 encounter at Mexico City Stadium. His rapid-fire goals provided England with early dominance in the knockout tie.
content: Jude Bellingham scores two goals in 98 seconds to give England a 2-0 lead over Mexico during their last 16 match at the Mexico City Stadium.

zh.title: 贝林厄姆98秒内打进两球，令阿兹特克沉寂
zh.summary: 朱德·贝林厄姆在墨西哥城体育场进行的16强对阵墨西哥的比赛中仅用98秒就打进两球，为英格兰建立2:0领先。他迅速连续的进球为英格兰在淘汰赛中提供了早期优势。

title: Ageing Brazil need major surgery - but is Ancelotti the man to do it?
summary: Brazil's elimination by Norway in the last-16 represents a devastating setback for the five-time World Cup champions, marking a historic tournament exit. Tim Vickery's analysis suggests Brazil's aging squad requires fundamental restructuring, with questions about manager Carlo Ancelotti's ability to lead the rebuild.
content: There was nothing unlucky about Brazil's loss to Norway in the last 16 of the World Cup and their exit at this stage is an unmitigated disaster, writes Tim Vickery.

zh.title: 老龄化的巴西需要大手术——但安切洛蒂是否是合适的人选？
zh.summary: 巴西在16强被挪威淘汰是对五次世界杯冠军的沉重打击，标志着一次历史性的淘汰赛出局。蒂姆·维克里的分析表明，巴西老龄化的球队需要根本性的重组，同时对主帅卡洛·安切洛蒂是否能够领导重建提出了疑问。

title: 'Sportsmanship in question' after decision to suspend Balogun red card
summary: World Cup pundits criticized the decision to suspend the red card issued to USA forward Folarin Balogun during the round of 32 match against Bosnia-Herzegovina. The controversial call raises concerns about inconsistent application of disciplinary rules at the tournament.
content: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Wayne Rooney, Joe Hart, and Micah Richards react to the decision to suspend the red card shown to the USA's Florian Balogun during their round of 32 tie with Bosnia-Herzegovina.

zh.title: 暂停巴洛贡红牌后"体育精神受到质疑"
zh.summary: 世界杯评论员批评了在美国前锋福拉林·巴洛贡与波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那的32强赛中获得的红牌被暂停的决定。这个有争议的判罚引发了人们对锦标赛中纪律规则应用不一致的担忧。

title: How 'remarkable' Haaland lead Norway to win over Brazil
summary: World Cup analysts highlighted Erling Haaland's dominant performance as he led Norway to a stunning victory over Brazil in the last-16. Haaland's exceptional play earned praise from veteran pundits for his commanding role in securing Norway's historic advancement.
content: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Wayne Rooney, Joe Hart, and Micah Richards look at how "absolute monster" Erling Haaland inspired Norway to victory over Brazil in the last 16 of the World Cup.

zh.title: "非凡的"哈兰德如何带领挪威战胜巴西
zh.summary: 世界杯分析师强调了埃林·哈兰德在带领挪威在16强中以令人震惊的比分战胜巴西时的主导表现。哈兰德的卓越表现因其在确保挪威历史性晋级中的关键作用而获得资深评论员的赞扬。
